name: xiaoyaner0201--pokopia-guide
description: Pokémon Pokopia (宝可批/宝可森/ぽこポケ) game guide. Full Pokédex (300 Pokémon with EN/ZH/JP names), habitat requirements, items, comfort system, Ditto skills, specialties, and walkthrough. Supports trilingual queries (English, 中文, 日本語). Triggers: Pokopia, pokopia, 宝可批, 宝可森, ぽこポケ, ぽこあポケモン, ポコピア, pokopia guide, pokopia dex, pokopia habitat, pokopia comfort, pokopia ditto, pokopia item, pokopia walkthrough, pokopia specialty, pokopia roommate
